name: Toy Theatre Dollhouse - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Spark your little one's imagination with this Toy Theatre Dollhouse from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This toy dollhouse features a theater, windows, seats and more to help engage their imaginations and makes for a fun decorative piece. Made of wood, this toy dollhouse is suggested for ages three years and up.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
